items.title: Sample: GPT-5 Released with Reasoning Improvements
items.summary: OpenAI releases GPT-5 with significant improvements in multi-step reasoning and reduced hallucinations.

items.title: Sample: New SOTA on Mathematical Reasoning Benchmarks
items.summary: Researchers achieve state-of-the-art results using chain-of-thought distillation from large to small models.

items.title: Sample: LLaMA 4 Weights Released on Hugging Face
items.summary: Meta releases LLaMA 4 weights under a permissive license, enabling local deployment on consumer hardware.
